title: Phone is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Poly Lens app mobile device appears in lens server inventory list and is linked to the correct device type after logging in and navigating to Account settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens mobile app.
3. Navigate to Lens Menu > General > Account.
4. Verify the account details are displayed.
5. Open the Lens server inventory list (e.g., via the web portal or server interface).
6. Confirm the mobile app appears in the inventory list.
7. Verify the mobile app is linked to the proper device (Android or iPhone).
expected: The mobile app appears on the Lens server inventory list and is linked to the proper device (Android or iPhone).
